$comment: Source of truth for the upstream AG2 version these skills were verified against. To see what changed upstream since, diff the pinned commit: `git -C <ag2-checkout> diff ag2_commit..main -- ag2` (see scripts/check_drift.sh).
scope_note: These skills document the AG2 API (the `ag2` namespace) ONLY. They do not cover AG2 Classic (the `autogen` namespace).
verification_method: Every SKILL.md was cross-checked against the ag2 source at the pinned commit; example code was executed against ag2==0.14.0.
